title: Metodlar
subtitle: Parametre, varsayilan deger, blok kullanimi.
code:
def square(x)
  x * x
end

def add(a, b)
  a + b
end

# Varsayilan parametre
def greet(name, greeting = "Merhaba")
  "#{greeting}, #{name}!"
end

# Degisken sayida parametre (splat operator)
def total(*numbers)
  numbers.sum
end

# Lambda / proc
multiply = ->(a, b) { a * b }

puts "Kare: #{square(5)}"
puts "Toplam: #{add(3, 7)}"
puts greet("Ayse")
puts greet("Mehmet", "Selam")
puts "Coklu toplam: #{total(1, 2, 3, 4, 5)}"

puts "\nLambda carpim: #{multiply.call(4, 5)}"

# Blok alan metod
def repeat(times)
  times.times { |i| yield i }
end

puts "\nBlok ornegi:"
repeat(3) { |i| puts "Tekrar #{i}" }
